summary: The diff implements both REQ-26 (hover-to-edit) and REQ-27 (advanced Footer redesign) with substantial coverage. REQ-26 is implemented via the new InlineEditable component integrated into all seven editor panels. REQ-27 is largely implemented with a branded top section, multi-column layout, bottom bar, and extended backend DetailedFooter type. A minor gap exists around dark/light mode CSS custom property usage in InlineEditable.

missing_requirements.requirement: The hover-to-edit UI uses the existing glassmorphism aesthetic and CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes.
missing_requirements.reason: InlineEditable.tsx uses hardcoded Tailwind classes such as 'text-white', 'bg-white/10', and 'border-blue-400/50' rather than the CSS custom property tokens (e.g., var(--foreground), var(--card)) defined in index.css, meaning the component does not correctly adapt its colors in light mode.
